steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts abstract sculptures with pieces that portray subjects in realistic detail. In those realistic works, viewers can easily recognize the familiar objects being shown, so the blank needs a verb meaning to recognize or determine what something is.

steps.title: Pick the precise verb
steps.content: A means to uncover or disclose, which is not what viewers do here. B means recall from memory, but the point is visual recognition. C means disregard, the opposite of the intended meaning. The verb must mean recognize familiar objects. The answer is D.
